metadata.purpose: Verify Route C fund flow: fireblocks_passthrough -> 9cDDJ5g2 -> ?

wallet_9cDDJ5g2.note: Massive Fireblocks custody wallet. 2000 transfers cover only ~14 minutes of activity (2026-03-28). Transfers from 9exPdTUV happened Jan 21-22 2026 — too old to reach within 20-page limit.

fireblocks_passthrough.note: Active only Jan 21-22 2026. 760 outflows (6429 SOL) ALL go to 9cDDJ5g2.

explanation: CONFIRMED: 9exPdTUV sends ALL outflows (760 transfers, 6429 SOL) to 9cDDJ5g2.
INCONCLUSIVE: 9cDDJ5g2 is a massive Fireblocks Custody wallet (isUserAddress=false) with extreme volume.
2000-transfer limit covers only ~14 minutes of recent activity, cannot reach Jan 2026 transfers from 9exPdTUV.
Neither 2q8nSJgC nor Token Millionaire appear in the 2000 most recent 9cDDJ5g2 transfers.
9cDDJ5g2 is NOT the secondary_aggregator (that is 2q8nSJgC). The investigation-notes incorrectly conflate them.
9cDDJ5g2 is a Fireblocks shared custody wallet used by many entities — deployer funds entering it are mixed with other traffic.
Route C correctly flows: Sources → 9exPdTUV → 9cDDJ5g2 (Fireblocks Custody). What happens INSIDE Fireblocks custody is opaque.
